page.title: C1 Mixed Revision
page.subtitle_html: C1 Mixed Revision - final Polyglot C1 drill across advanced conditionals, reporting, passive, register, and linking.
page.subtitle_text: Final Polyglot C1 drill across advanced conditionals, reporting, passive, register, and linking.

blocks.body: {"level":"C1","intro":"C1 Mixed Revision: compact anchor for the final Polyglot C1 mixed drill.","rules":[{"label":"Mixed structures","text":"Review advanced conditionals, inversion, passive, reporting, clauses, modal perfect, and formal style together.","example":"If I had accepted the offer, I would be working abroad now."},{"label":"Meaning first","text":"Choose the structure that preserves tense, emphasis, register, and logical relation.","example":"Not only did the policy change, but its effects were also immediate."},{"label":"Final drill","text":"Use the final lesson to test flexible C1 sentence construction across the whole course.","example":"The report is believed to have been revised before publication."}]}

blocks.heading: C1 focus
blocks.body: This compact page exists as the theory anchor for the Polyglot English C1 final drill lesson package.
